decisionPanels.title: Tonight's decision
decisionPanels.summary: Double down on vertical/video-native explainers and creator-led distribution this week; platform + audience signals align.
actions: Ship 2 test packages/day in vertical-first format (30-60s + 90-150s) with explicit hook in first 2 seconds.
Pilot AI dubbing/subtitle localisation on one UK politics or sport explainer for non-UK English audiences.
Shift social KPI review to watch-time + completion + saves/shares, not just clicks.

decisionPanels.title: Ops stack watch (iconik/LucidLink/Backlight)
decisionPanels.summary: Backlight is publicly leaning into review/collaboration and AI-assisted live/vertical workflows; verify iconik/LucidLink release deltas directly tomorrow due anti-bot fetch limits tonight.
actions: Have one producer run an iconik Review workflow drill (secure share + review notes + turnaround timing).
Check LucidLink build deltas (SSO, lock handling, performance) against current launcher assumptions before next rollout.
Capture any workflow risk in the MMR launch checklist by noon.

decisionPanels.title: Audience growth signal
decisionPanels.summary: Reuters Institute trendline still favors social/video discovery over direct homepage behavior; institutional trust remains an asset but distribution has to be platform-native.
actions: Map one major story/day into: article, short vertical, and creator-facing clip package.
Run editor checklist: voice, on-screen text, context card, and misinformation guardrails.
Track creator/influencer citation strategy for explainers where personality-led formats are outperforming.
